data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of sending a digital ticket to the client email/app. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for a digital ticket, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that this requirement is implemented, leading to a clear gap.
gaps: No evidence of digital ticket being sent to client email/app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
